prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(register_entity local_treasury_node)
(register_entity local_business_unit_instance)
(register_entity central_treasury_primary)
(register_entity central_treasury_secondary)
(link_funding_source local_treasury_node primary_funding_source)
(attach_cash_forecast local_treasury_node cash_forecast_base_case)
(enable_allocation_readiness local_treasury_node cash_forecast_base_case)
(assign_approver_role local_treasury_node local_treasury_approver)
(select_liquidity_bucket local_treasury_node operational_liquidity_bucket cash_forecast_base_case)
(confirm_local_treasury_buffer local_treasury_node operational_liquidity_bucket local_treasury_approver)
(release_approver_role local_treasury_node local_treasury_approver)
(detach_cash_forecast local_treasury_node cash_forecast_base_case)
(link_funding_source local_business_unit_instance backup_funding_source)
(attach_cash_forecast local_business_unit_instance cash_forecast_base_case)
(enable_allocation_readiness local_business_unit_instance cash_forecast_base_case)
(assign_approver_role local_business_unit_instance local_treasury_approver)
(select_maturity_bucket local_business_unit_instance short_term_maturity_bucket cash_forecast_base_case)
(confirm_business_unit_buffer local_business_unit_instance short_term_maturity_bucket local_treasury_approver)
(release_approver_role local_business_unit_instance local_treasury_approver)
(draft_allocation_proposal local_treasury_node local_business_unit_instance operational_liquidity_bucket short_term_maturity_bucket allocation_proposal_record)
(detach_cash_forecast local_business_unit_instance cash_forecast_base_case)
(attach_cash_forecast local_treasury_node cash_forecast_base_case)
(apply_allocation_scenario allocation_proposal_record local_treasury_node cash_forecast_base_case)
(authorize_local_treasury_execution local_treasury_node allocation_proposal_record)
(authorize_business_unit_execution local_business_unit_instance allocation_proposal_record)
(link_funding_source central_treasury_primary contingent_funding_source)
(detach_cash_forecast local_treasury_node cash_forecast_base_case)
(attach_cash_forecast central_treasury_primary cash_forecast_base_case)
(enable_allocation_readiness central_treasury_primary cash_forecast_base_case)
(prepare_liquidity_metric_review central_treasury_primary liquidity_coverage_metric allocation_proposal_record)
(start_central_review central_treasury_primary liquidity_coverage_metric allocation_proposal_record cash_forecast_base_case)
(attach_settlement_instruction central_treasury_primary settlement_instruction_packet)
(assign_approver_role central_treasury_primary local_treasury_approver)
(request_central_authorization central_treasury_primary settlement_instruction_packet local_treasury_approver liquidity_coverage_metric allocation_proposal_record)
(release_approver_role central_treasury_primary local_treasury_approver)
(attach_executive_approval central_treasury_primary executive_approval_token)
(complete_central_review central_treasury_primary executive_approval_token liquidity_coverage_metric allocation_proposal_record)
(finalize_allocation_authorization central_treasury_primary)
(issue_funding_request_token central_treasury_primary issued_funding_request_token cash_forecast_base_case)
(settle_central_treasury_transfer central_treasury_primary contingent_funding_source issued_funding_request_token)
(link_funding_source central_treasury_secondary contingent_funding_source)
(detach_cash_forecast central_treasury_primary cash_forecast_base_case)
(attach_cash_forecast central_treasury_secondary cash_forecast_base_case)
(enable_allocation_readiness central_treasury_secondary cash_forecast_base_case)
(prepare_liquidity_metric_review central_treasury_secondary liquidity_stress_metric allocation_proposal_record)
(start_central_review central_treasury_secondary liquidity_stress_metric allocation_proposal_record cash_forecast_base_case)
(release_settlement_instruction central_treasury_primary settlement_instruction_packet)
(attach_settlement_instruction central_treasury_secondary settlement_instruction_packet)
(assign_approver_role central_treasury_secondary local_treasury_approver)
(request_central_authorization central_treasury_secondary settlement_instruction_packet local_treasury_approver liquidity_stress_metric allocation_proposal_record)
(release_approver_role central_treasury_secondary local_treasury_approver)
(release_executive_approval central_treasury_primary executive_approval_token)
(attach_executive_approval central_treasury_secondary executive_approval_token)
(complete_central_review central_treasury_secondary executive_approval_token liquidity_stress_metric allocation_proposal_record)
(finalize_allocation_authorization central_treasury_secondary)
(issue_funding_request_token central_treasury_secondary issued_funding_request_token cash_forecast_base_case)
(settle_central_treasury_transfer central_treasury_secondary contingent_funding_source issued_funding_request_token)
(detach_cash_forecast central_treasury_secondary cash_forecast_base_case)
(attach_cash_forecast local_treasury_node cash_forecast_base_case)
(issue_funding_request_token local_treasury_node issued_funding_request_token cash_forecast_base_case)
(settle_local_treasury_transfer local_treasury_node primary_funding_source issued_funding_request_token)
(detach_cash_forecast local_treasury_node cash_forecast_base_case)
(attach_cash_forecast local_business_unit_instance cash_forecast_base_case)
(issue_funding_request_token local_business_unit_instance issued_funding_request_token cash_forecast_base_case)
(settle_business_unit_transfer local_business_unit_instance backup_funding_source issued_funding_request_token)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem involves treasury allocation with central and local treasuries, business units, etc. The goal is to settle allocations for local_treasury_node, local_business_unit_instance, central_treasury_primary, and central_treasury_secondary.


## Examining Treasury Allocation  
- The problem focuses on settling allocations across different treasury levels, including central and local treasuries.  
- Key entities involved are local_treasury_node, local_business_unit_instance, central_treasury_primary, and central_treasury_secondary.  
- The goal is to ensure proper distribution and settlement of funds among these units.  
- The process requires coordination between central and local levels to balance financial resources.  
- Business units play a role in the allocation, suggesting a hierarchical structure for fund management.

## Examining Treasury Allocation  
- Entities must prepare buffers for local_treasury and business_unit, either by selecting a bucket and confirming or reserving a transfer.  
- A single allocation_proposal_record links to both central treasuries, requiring review from central_treasuries.  
- All four entities—local_treasury_node, local_business_unit_instance, central_treasury_primary, and central_treasury_secondary—must go through registration, readiness, authorization, funding request issuance, and settlement.  
- Resources like funding sources can be reused after settling, as settling makes funding_source_available again.  
- Cash_forecast is singular and needs to be attached or detached during the process, while only treasury_policy_document is available for policy documents.  

## Sequencing Resource Management  
- Registration is needed first for all entities, achieved by registering each: local_treasury_node, local_business_unit_instance, central_treasury_primary, and central_treasury_secondary.  
- Settling each entity requires funding_request_issued, which depends on execution_authorized, entity linking to cash_forecast, and funding_request_available.  

## Authorizing Execution  
- For locals and business units, execution_authorized needs local_treasury_ready (or business), buffer_confirmed, allocation_proposal_ready, allocation_record, and scenario_applied.  
- For central treasuries, execution_authorized can follow paths like finalize_allocation_authorization, finalize from packet, or close final signoff, indicating multiple authorization routes.

## Managing Registration and Funding  
- Registration is needed for all entities first, starting with central_treasury_primary and central_treasury_secondary.  
- Funding sources are assigned: primary linked to local, backup to business, and contingent funding source linked to central_treasury_primary.  

## Handling Cash Forecast Dynamics  
- Cash forecast initially linked to business unit, requiring detachment for central use, like attaching to central_treasury_primary.  
- Attaching and detaching cash forecasts, such as to local_treasury_node, is necessary for actions like applying allocation scenarios.  

## Sequencing Allocation Steps  
- To apply allocation scenarios, entities must link to cash forecasts, requiring careful sequencing to avoid detaching prematurely.  
- Local treasury processes, like buffer preparation, should complete before moving cash and approver to business units to minimize disruptions.

## Sequencing Allocation Steps  
- Requesting central authorization requires review started, settlement linked to central, and approver linked to central, but currently, settlement and approver are not linked to central.  
- To link settlement, attach_settlement_instruction is needed, requiring allocation readiness for central, which is currently met, and settlement_instruction_available.  

- Approver is currently linked to the business unit, so release_approver_role from the business unit is necessary before assigning it to central.  
- Since liquidity and maturity validations are not passed, use request_central_authorization without override, ensuring auth_requested is set after conditions are met.  

## Completing Central Review  
- Completing central review for central_treasury_primary requires auth_requested, linking executive approval, and liquidity coverage metric, with no liquidity or maturity validations passed.  
- After review, finalize_allocation_authorization sets finalization_complete and execution_authorized, fitting the case without validations.

## Managing Execution Authorization  
- Execution_authorized is required, with cash currently linked to the primary central treasury, and only one funding_request_token available.  
- The draft proposal links to buckets, ensuring no conflicts, as central review uses allocation_record without impacting local authorization processes.  

## Sharing Resources Across Centrals  
- Resources like settlement, approver, and executive approval are shared, requiring attachment to each central as needed, with release and reattachment supported.  
- For secondary, the allocation_policy_document is linked but not available, potentially limiting policy-related actions, though the current path avoids policy use.  

## Coordinating Settlement Paths  
- Settling centrals and locals can occur independently, with no dependency requiring centrals to settle before locals, and allocation_record supports both paths.  
- The non-reserve path used avoids transfer_order conflicts, as confirm actions don’t consume it, aligning with the single transfer_order available.

## Assigning Approver Role  
- Requesting central authorization requires entity_links_approver_role for the central primary, needing allocation_ready and approver_available.  
- After releasing the approver role from the business unit, assign_approver_role to central_primary using local_treasury_approver.  

## Linking Funding Sources  
- For central_treasury_secondary, link_funding_source requires an available funding source, like contingent_funding_source, which becomes available after primary settlement.  
- Primary_funding_source, bound to local but not settled, remains unavailable for secondary until local settlement occurs.  

## Preparing Central Review for Secondary  
- Prepare_liquidity_metric_review for central_treasury_secondary links liquidity_stress_metric to allocation_proposal_record, consuming the metric.  
- Start_central_review for secondary needs links_cash and allocation_proposal_record, proceeding without liquidity validation.  

## Executing Settlement Process  
- Issue_funding_request_token for central_treasury_primary requires links_cash, using cash_forecast_base_case to set issued_funding_request_token.  
- Settle_central_treasury_transfer for primary uses contingent_funding_source and issued_funding_request_token, setting settled status and making funding available.

## Managing Funding Availability  
- Primary_funding_source remains unavailable for central_treasury_secondary as it’s bound to local and not settled.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
